title: daucus carota subsp. intermedius
intro: Daucus carota subsp. intermedius, commonly known as the wild carrot or intermediate carrot, is a subspecies of the carrot plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, and has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Daucus carota subsp. intermedius include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb for overall well-being. Daucus carota subsp. intermedius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
